nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 55, with temperatures rising to around 60 overnight. South southeast wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 9am and noon, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 72, with temperatures falling to around 69 in the afternoon. South southeast wind 10 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
